mapper.select: SELECT orgcod AS id, suporgcod AS parentId, orgnam AS name, orgcod AS code, orglvl AS level, dspsqn AS sort, strdte, enddte FROM bmip_sys_ttlorginf WHERE (strdte IS NULL OR strdte = '' OR strdte <= #{today}) AND (enddte IS NULL OR enddte = '' OR enddte >= #{today}) ORDER BY dspsqn ASC, orgcod ASC

SELECT orgcod AS id, suporgcod AS parentId, orgnam AS name, orgcod AS code, orglvl AS level, dspsqn AS sort, strdte, enddte FROM bmip_sys_ttlorginf WHERE suporgcod = #{orgcod} AND (strdte IS NULL OR strdte = '' OR strdte <= #{today}) AND (enddte IS NULL OR enddte = '' OR enddte >= #{today}) ORDER BY dspsqn ASC, orgcod ASC
SELECT orglev0, orglev1, orglev2, orglev3, orglev4, orglev5, orglev6, orglev7 FROM ${tableName} WHERE dte = #{dte} AND orgcod = #{orgcod} LIMIT 1
